positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial map featuring abstract constellations, bioluminescent flora, and cosmic nebula swirls. The main elements should form a strong, central visual pattern suitable for repeat tiling or large single prints. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and deep-sea bioluminescence, utilizing clean, graphic lines against soft gradients. Color palette: deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and stark gold highlights. Focus on clean silhouettes and high contrast between the luminous elements and the dark background. Vector-art quality, highly detailed, symmetrical, centralized composition, perfect for screen printing on dark apparel.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, low detail, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, graffiti, ugly, amateur, photorealism, human figures
